source.title: Refund-Only Policy Reform (仅退款取消) — Merchant Satisfaction Impact

extractions.claim: All 5 major Chinese e-commerce platforms cancelled 'refund-only' default on April 22, 2025
extractions.evidence: On April 22, 2025, Taobao, Pinduoduo, JD.com, Douyin, and Kuaishou simultaneously announced they would no longer proactively intervene in consumer 'refund-only' requests — merchants would handle them independently.

verification.verifier_notes: Source: guancha.cn, finance.sina.com.cn, multiple Chinese media outlets

extractions.claim: Post-reform: malicious refund-only orders on Pinduoduo dropped 62%
extractions.evidence: After the new rules took effect, Pinduoduo malicious refund-only order volume decreased 62%, and merchant dispute resolution success rate rose from 18% to 75%.

verification.verifier_notes: Source: E-commerce industry association data, December 2025

extractions.claim: Merchant complaints about 'refund-only' dropped from 50.36% to 37.09% of total complaints
extractions.evidence: '电诉宝' data shows 'arbitrary refund-only' complaints as share of total merchant complaints: Q1 2025: 50.36%, Q3 2025: 35.85%, Q4 2025: 37.09% — significant improvement.

verification.verifier_notes: Source: 电诉宝 platform quarterly data

extractions.claim: Prior to reform, 7.9% of merchants had 80%+ refund-only rates
extractions.evidence: 网经社 2024 survey: 7.9% of merchants experienced 80%+ refund-only rates in the past year. 10.09% had 50%+ rates. Only 1.06% had never experienced refund-only. Pinduoduo merchant appeal success rate was under 5%.

verification.verifier_notes: Source: 网经社电子商务研究中心《2024年电商平台仅退款调查报告》

extractions.claim: Market regulator (SAMR) mandated refund-only policy reform
extractions.evidence: The State Administration for Market Regulation (SAMR) vice director Shu Wei stated that SAMR summoned major e-commerce platforms to address 'refund-only' rules that squeezed merchant survival space and promoted low-quality/low-price competition.

extractions.claim: April 2025: Pinduoduo launched '千亿扶持' (100B yuan) merchant support program
extractions.evidence: In April 2025, Pinduoduo launched a '千亿扶持' program to invest over 100 billion yuan over 3 years in merchant support, upgrading from the previous '百亿减免' (10B fee reduction). Focus: demand aggregation, cost reduction, fair traffic distribution.
